_comment: EXAMPLE (rc.15 · WS7) — the BrainKit estate registry for the fictional Meridian Trust. It answers the five questions a BrainKit release must: which repos use it, which controls changed, which products need re-evaluation, what supersedes what, and whether an unsafe release can be withdrawn across the estate. This is DATA (no live service); brainkit-registry-check.mjs verifies its integrity and — the point — that no repository pins a revoked release. Mounts at docs/governance/brainkit-registry.json, owned by the institutional context owner.

releases.revocation_reason: terminology section cited a retired regulatory source; withdrawn estate-wide
